mapper.sql: Id, ApplyNo, Applydate, AnswerNo, ModelNo, Quantity, OrdDate, AsseDate, ResidueNo, Pid, QtyOrdpre, Optstate, QtyWarning, QtyNoord, Remark, Price_lot, PartPrepare_days, Description_Remark, CustomerNo, DeptNo, IndCode, Shikomi_Class, Shikomi_Class_Code, UserName, Opttime, IsRemind, ApplicantName, ApplicantEmail, ApproverName, ApproverEmail
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._shikomi_bj
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._shikomi_bj (Id, ApplyNo, Applydate, AnswerNo, ModelNo, Quantity, OrdDate, AsseDate, ResidueNo, Pid, QtyOrdpre, Optstate, QtyWarning, QtyNoord, Remark, Price_lot, PartPrepare_days, Description_Remark, CustomerNo, DeptNo, IndCode, Shikomi_Class, Shikomi_Class_Code, UserName, Opttime, IsRemind, ApplicantName, ApplicantEmail, ApproverName, ApproverEmail ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{applyno,jdbcType=NCHAR}, #{applydate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{answerno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{assedate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{residueno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qtyordpre,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{optstate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qtywarning,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtynoord,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{priceLot,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{partprepareDays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{descriptionRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{deptno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{indcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{shikomiClass,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{shikomiClassCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isremind,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{applicantname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicantemail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approveremail,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

mapper.update:
update dbo._shikomi_bj
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ApplyNo = #{record.applyno,jdbcType=NCHAR},
Applydate = #{record.applydate,jdbcType=DATE},
AnswerNo = #{record.answerno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
OrdDate = #{record.orddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
AsseDate = #{record.assedate,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ResidueNo = #{record.residueno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Pid = #{record.pid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyOrdpre = #{record.qtyordpre,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Optstate = #{record.optstate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyWarning = #{record.qtywarning,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyNoord = #{record.qtynoord,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Price_lot = #{record.priceLot,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
PartPrepare_days = #{record.partprepareDays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Description_Remark = #{record.descriptionRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
IndCode = #{record.indcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Shikomi_Class = #{record.shikomiClass,jdbcType=CHAR},
Shikomi_Class_Code = #{record.shikomiClassCode,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserName = #{record.username,jdbcType=CHAR},
Opttime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
IsRemind = #{record.isremind,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ApplicantName = #{record.applicantname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApplicantEmail = #{record.applicantemail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApproverName = #{record.approvername,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApproverEmail = #{record.approveremail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo._shikomi_bj set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ApplyNo = #{record.applyno,jdbcType=NCHAR}, Applydate = #{record.applydate,jdbcType=DATE}, AnswerNo = #{record.answerno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, OrdDate = #{record.orddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, AsseDate = #{record.assedate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ResidueNo = #{record.residueno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Pid = #{record.pid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QtyOrdpre = #{record.qtyordpre,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Optstate = #{record.optstate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QtyWarning = #{record.qtywarning,jdbcType=INTEGER}, QtyNoord = #{record.qtynoord,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Price_lot = #{record.priceLot,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PartPrepare_days = #{record.partprepareDays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Description_Remark = #{record.descriptionRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, IndCode = #{record.indcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Shikomi_Class = #{record.shikomiClass,jdbcType=CHAR}, Shikomi_Class_Code = #{record.shikomiClassCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, UserName = #{record.username,jdbcType=CHAR}, Opttime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, IsRemind = #{record.isremind,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ApplicantName = #{record.applicantname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ApplicantEmail = #{record.applicantemail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ApproverName = #{record.approvername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ApproverEmail = #{record.approveremail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
